Sinhgad College of Engineering, Pune-41.
Department of Information Technology
PR/OR Examination TE, 2025-26
Data Science and Big Data Analytics Laboratory

Problem Statement 8:

Visualize the data using Python libraries matplotlib, seaborn by plotting the graphs for
(assignment no. 3). Integrate Python and Hadoop and perform the following operations on
forest fire dataset:
a. Data analysis using the Map Reduce in PyHadoop
b. Data mining in Hive

Lab: Lab 40
